programs.title: The Last Thing Mary Saw
programs.desc: In the spring of 1840, a family questions the circumstances of the death of their matriarch.

programs.title: Sacrifice
programs.desc: A surgeon finds a woman with her heart ripped out and strange symbols carved into her flesh.

programs.title: Swallow
programs.desc: A newly pregnant woman feels compelled to eat dangerous objects.

programs.title: The Babadook
programs.desc: A widow discovers the monster her son fears is real and lurking around the house.

programs.title: Centigrade
programs.desc: A man and his pregnant wife fight for survival when they become buried in snow and ice in their car.

programs.title: A Dark Song
programs.desc: A young woman and a damaged occultist risk their souls to perform a ritual.
